sku_id: Chemical Guys 16-Piece Car Washing & Interior Detailing Kit - Vehicle Wash Kit with Camo Bucket, Torq Foam Cleaner,

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Show a person in a driveway on a sunny day trying to wash a car with just a garden hose and bucket. Close-up slow-motion of thin watery suds breaking apart on the dirty hood, dirt still visible underneath, water spots forming in the bright sun. The person looks frustrated.
3-6s: Quickly introduce the product as the direct solution. The Chemical Guys TORQ Foam Blaster 6 Pro enters the frame connected to the hose. Thick white foam blankets the entire car. The green chenille wash mitt glides smoothly over the paint. Dirt lifts instantly.
6-10s: Fast-cut scene 1 showing the first clear result. The car hood glossy and clean after rinse, sunlight reflecting off wet paint, no water spots, no streaks. The Chemical Guys camo detailing bucket visible on the ground nearby.
Do not start with a perfect product shot.
Do not end with a CTA in this segment.
Keep the pacing fast, clear, and product-focused.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
segments.negative_prompt: no text overlay, no watermark, no platform UI, no packaging, no product color change, no extra accessories, no brand other than Chemical Guys

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Show a person kneeling next to a dirty car wheel with a bucket of blackened grimy water. Close-up of a dark, contaminated sponge touching a silver wheel spoke, instantly smearing a gray film of brake dust across the clean metal. The person looks disgusted at the cross-contamination.
3-6s: Quickly introduce the product as the direct solution. The orange Chemical Guys Sticky Citrus Wheel Cleaner spray bottle enters frame. It sprays onto the wheel. The green Chemical Guys wheel brush scrubs the spokes. Brake dust dissolves and rinses away clean, revealing bright silver metal.
6-10s: Fast-cut scene 1 showing the first clear result. Close-up of a single clean wheel spoke. Bright silver with no residue. Water beading on the clean surface. The Sticky Citrus bottle and wheel brush visible nearby.
